title: Add #![forbid(unsafe_code)] to lichen-ipv6, lichen-rpl and lichen-senml
description: Add #![forbid(unsafe_code)] at the crate root of their lib.rs (after no_std line). Ensure it applies to the whole crate. Check for unsafe code. Reference coding guidelines in rust section of AGENTS.md.
close_reason: Added #![forbid(unsafe_code)] to the three specified crates after no_std. No unsafe code present in lichen-ipv6 or lichen-senml; rpl submodule already had it. Tests not run due to missing cargo in env but changes are attribute-only and compile-safe.
